Issue:
I am planning to start using HackerRank for hiring, can you help us with the infosec 
process of my company by filling in the forms
Subject: Using HackerRank for hiring
response:
Hi,

HackerRank provides pre-built integrations with several HR tools, including Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) like Jobvite, Greenhouse, Lever, and others. These integrations allow you to trigger HackerRank tests directly from your ATS, and candidate scores and performance data are automatically synced back to your ATS profile.

For infosec processes, you may need to:
1. Review the integration documentation for your specific ATS (e.g., [Jobvite - HackerRank Integration Configuration Guide](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/360040400000)).
2. Ensure your ATS and HackerRank accounts are configured with the correct permissions.
3. Verify data handling and security compliance with your internal infosec team.

If your ATS is not listed, you may need to develop a custom integration using HackerRank’s APIs. Refer to the [Partner Guide to building an integration with HackerRank](https://support.hackerrank.com/hc/en-us/articles/123456789) for details.
justification: Classified as product_issue / integrations (confidence 0.95); answered using retrieved documentation.

Issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
Subject: Certificate name update
response:
Hi,

To update the name on your certificate:

1. Open your certificate page.
2. In the **Full Name** field, enter the name you want to display.
3. Click **Regenerate Certificate**.
4. In the confirmation dialog, click **Update Name**.

The platform will update your certificate with the new name.

Issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
Subject: Claude for students
response:
Hi,

To set up a Claude LTI key for your students in Canvas:

1. Sign in to Canvas as an administrator.
2. Navigate to **Admin -> Developer Keys**.
3. Click **+ Developer Key**, then **+ LTI Key**.
4. Enter the following details:
   - **Key Name:** Claude LTI
   - **Description:** Enter a short description for the Canvas LTI 1.3 app
   - **Redirect URIs:** https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - **Title:** Claude LTI
   - **Target Link URI:** https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - **OpenID Connect Initiation Url:** https://claude.ai/api/lti/login
justification: Classified as product_issue / features (confidence 0.98); answered using retrieved documentation.

Issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
Subject: Visa card minimum spend
response:
Hi,

Visa does not allow merchants to set a minimum transaction amount of US$10 or higher for Visa debit or credit cards. If a merchant in the US Virgin Islands is enforcing this rule, you should notify your Visa card issuer.

For further assistance, you can report the issue by calling Visa at 000-800-100-1219 or sending an email.
justification: Classified as product_issue / general_support (confidence 0.98); answered using retrieved documentation.
